title: manage input
description: Input schema for the manage tool.

older_than_days.description: Delete flows older than this many days. Must be >= 1.

confirm.description: Confirm bulk deletion (required for older_than_days, protocol, or delete-all).

protocol.description: Protocol filter for delete_flows (e.g. HTTP/1.x, HTTPS, WebSocket, HTTP/2, gRPC, gRPC-Web, TCP).

format.description: Export format: 'jsonl' (default) or 'har' (HTTP Archive 1.2, file output only).

time_after.description: Include flows after this time (RFC3339 format).

time_before.description: Include flows before this time (RFC3339 format).

include_bodies.description: Include message bodies in export (default: true).

output_path.description: File path to write export data.

input_path.description: File path to read import data.

on_conflict.description: Conflict policy for import: skip or replace (default: skip).
